hooks.command: FILE=$(cat | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); [ -n "$FILE" ] && npx eslint --fix "$FILE" 2>/dev/null || true
FILE=$(cat | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); [ -n "$FILE" ] && npx prettier --write "$FILE" 2>/dev/null || true

FILE=$(cat | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); [ -n "$FILE" ] && { TEST_FILE=$(echo "$FILE" | sed 's/\.[^.]*$/.test&/'); [ -f "$TEST_FILE" ] && npx vitest run "$TEST_FILE" --reporter=verbose 2>/dev/null || true; } || true
BRANCH=$(git branch --show-current 2>/dev/null); CHANGES=$(git diff --name-only 2>/dev/null | head -10); [ -n "$BRANCH" ] && echo "Current branch: $BRANCH. Changed files: ${CHANGES:-none}" || true
